title: 人机交互，机器人技术论文速递--(2026-03-18)
author: tianhe
digest: 今日最新 Arxiv 论文摘要汇总 (2026-03-18)
content:
璇玑枢，助力学术成长，点亮科研之路

 

今日论文合集：cs.HC人机交互19篇，cs.RO机器人技术60篇，q-bio.NC神经元和认知0篇


本文只展示部分论文，全部详情，AI总结请访问，或点击阅读原文
https://scouthe.github.io/arxiv_crawler_ai_enhanced/

 

 

人机交互(cs.HC:Human-Computer Interaction)

【1】Thermopneumatic Pixels for Fast, Localized, Low-Voltage Touch Feedback

标题 : 用于快速、局部、低压触摸反馈的热气动像素
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16750
作者：Max Linnander,Yon Visell
摘要：我们推出热气动像素 (TPP)，它们是触觉执行器，旨在快速制造并直接集成到紧凑型可穿戴和基于表面的触觉系统中。每个 TPP 将低压 ($\sim$10 V) 电脉冲转换为密封腔内的瞬态压力增量，产生适合触觉刺激的面外力和位移。该架构实现了可扩展的制造和空间分布式驱动，同时保持简单的电气接口。 TPP 由廉价、容易获得的材料制成，使用简单的基于层的组装，有助于快速原型设计和集成到交互式设备中。机械特性表明峰值力超过 1 N 和毫米位移。我们进一步介绍了用于同时操作多个 TPP 模块的驱动电子设备，并报告了感知研究结果，证明了由此产生的触觉反馈的有效性。总之，这些结果确立了低压热气动驱动作为一种可访问且高性能的方法，用于将触觉反馈嵌入到实验和面向消费者的界面中。
Abstract：We present thermopneumatic pixels (TPPs), which are tactile actuators designed for rapid fabrication and straightforward integration into compact wearable and surface-based haptic systems. Each TPP converts low-voltage ($\sim$10 V) electrical pulses into transient pressure increases within a sealed cavity, producing out-of-plane forces and displacements suitable for tactile stimulation. The architecture enables scalable fabrication and spatially distributed actuation while maintaining simple electrical interfacing. The TPPs are constructed from inexpensive, readily available materials using straightforward layer-based assembly, facilitating rapid prototyping and integration into interactive devices. Mechanical characterization demonstrates peak forces exceeding 1 N and millimeter displacements. We further present driving electronics for operating multiple TPP modules concurrently and report perceptual study results demonstrating the effectiveness of the resulting tactile feedback. Together, these results establish low-voltage thermopneumatic actuation as an accessible and high-performance approach for embedding tactile feedback into experimental and consumer-facing interfaces.

 


【2】Whose Knowledge Counts? Co-Designing Community-Centered AI Auditing Tools with Educators in Hawai`i

标题 : 谁的知识重要？与夏威夷教育工作者共同设计以社区为中心的人工智能审计工具
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16646
作者：Dora Zhao,Hannah Cha,Michael J. Ryan,Angelina Wang,Rachel Baker-Ramos Evyn-Bree Helekahi-Kaiwi,Rebecca Diego,Josiah Hester,Diyi Yang
摘要：尽管生成式人工智能正在被部署到课堂中，并承诺为教师提供帮助，但教育工作者警告说，这些工具可能会产生意想不到的教学影响，包括文化误传和偏见。在人工智能系统经常表现不佳的语言资源匮乏和土著教育环境中，这些担忧更加突出。我们调查了夏威夷的这些挑战，那里的公立学校在全州范围内的授权下运营，将夏威夷语言和文化融入教育中。通过与 22 名公立学校教育工作者举办的四次联合设计研讨会，我们表达了对在教育环境中使用生成式人工智能的担忧，特别是在文化误传方面，以及解决这些问题的审计工具的相应设计。我们发现教育工作者设想的工具植根于特定的夏威夷文化价值观和实践，例如追溯源材料中的知识谱系。基于这些见解，我们将人工智能审计概念化为一个面向社区的过程，而不是孤立个人的工作，并讨论了设计审计工具的影响。
Abstract：Although generative AI is being deployed into classrooms with promises of aiding teachers, educators caution that these tools can have unintended pedagogical repercussions, including cultural misrepresentation and bias. These concerns are heightened in low-resource language and Indigenous education settings, where AI systems frequently underperform. We investigate these challenges in Hawai`i, where public schools operate under a statewide mandate to integrate Hawaiian language and culture into education. Through four co-design workshops with 22 public school educators, we surfaced concerns about using generative AI in educational settings, particularly around cultural misrepresentation, and corresponding designs for auditing tools that address these issues. We find that educators envision tools grounded in specific Hawaiian cultural values and practices, such as tracing the genealogy of knowledge in source materials. Building on these insights, we conceptualize AI auditing as a community-oriented process rather than the work of isolated individuals, and discuss implications for designing auditing tools.

 


【3】Why We Need to Destroy the Illusion of Speaking to A Human: Critical Reflections On Ethics at the Front-End for LLMs

标题 : 为什么我们需要打破与人交谈的幻想：对法学硕士前端道德的批判性反思
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16633
作者：Sarah Diefenbach,Daniel Ullrich
摘要：与基于大型语言模型 (LLM)（例如 ChatGPT）的聊天机器人进行对话已成为日常生活中与人工智能 (AI) 交互的主要形式之一。这种互动之所以如此方便，是因为与法学硕士的互动感觉如此自然，类似于我们从真实的人类对话中了解到的内容。与此同时，这种看似相似的现象也是人工智能设计的伦理挑战之一，因为它引发了许多关于人工智能的误导性想法。我们讨论了人类与人工智能对话和人际对话之间的异同，并强调了前端人工智能更道德设计的起点。
Abstract：Conversation with chatbots based on Large Language Models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT has become one of the major forms of interaction with Artificial Intelligence (AI) in everyday life. What makes this interaction so convenient is that interacting with LLMs feels so natural, and resembles what we know from real, human conversations. At the same time, this seeming similarity is part of one of the ethical challenges of AI design, since it activates many misleading ideas about AI. We discuss similarities and differences between human-AI-conversations and interpersonal conversation and highlight starting points for more ethical design of AI at the front-end.

 


【4】CoEmpaTeam: Enhancing Cognitive Empathy using LLM-based Avatars and Dynamic Role Play in Virtual Reality

标题 : CoEmpaTeam：使用基于法学硕士的化身和虚拟现实中的动态角色扮演增强认知同理心
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16614
作者：Dehui Kong,Martin Feick,Shi Liu,Alexander Maedche
摘要：认知同理心，即理解他人观点的能力，对于有效沟通、减少偏见和建设性谈判至关重要。然而，在一个以绩效为导向的社会中，这种技能正在下降，因为这个社会优先考虑效率而不是观点采择。在这里，认知同理心的训练具有挑战性，因为它是一种微妙的、难以察觉的软技能。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了 CoEmpaTeam，这是一个基于 VR 的系统，使用户能够通过使用法学硕士驱动的具有不同性格的化身来训练他们的认知同理心。通过动态角色扮演，用户积极地换位思考，通过另一个人的眼睛体验情境。 CoEmpaTeam 部署了三个个性显着不同的化身，并通过技术评估和在线实验进行了验证 (n=90)。接下来，我们通过实验室实验评估了该系统，32 名参与者在两周内进行了 3 次会议，然后进行了为期一周的日记研究。我们的结果显示认知同理心显着增加，据参与者称，这已经转移到他们的现实生活中。
Abstract：Cognitive empathy, the ability to understand others' perspectives, is essential for effective communication, reducing biases, and constructive negotiation. However, this skill is declining in a performance-driven society, which prioritizes efficiency over perspective-taking. Here, the training of cognitive empathy is challenging because it is a subtle, hard-to-perceive soft skill. To address this, we developed CoEmpaTeam, a VR-based system that enables users to train their cognitive empathy by using LLM-driven avatars with different personalities. Through dynamic role play, users actively engage in perspective-taking, experiencing situations through another person's eyes. CoEmpaTeam deploys three avatars who significantly differ in their personality, validated by a technical evaluation and an online experiment (n=90). Next, we evaluated the system through a lab experiment with 32 participants who performed three sessions across two weeks, followed by a one-week diary study. Our results showed a significant increase in cognitive empathy, which, according to participants, transferred into their real lives.

 


【5】One Kiss: Emojis as Agents of Genre Flux in Generative Comics

标题 : 一吻：表情符号作为生成漫画流派变化的推动者
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16359
作者：Xiruo Wang,Xinyi Jiang,Ziqi Lyu
摘要：生成式人工智能使视觉叙事变得更容易实现，但当前基于提示的交互往往迫使用户在精确控制和创意流程之间进行权衡。我们推出 One Kiss，这是一种引入“情感引导”的共同创意漫画生成系统。用户不再编写文本提示，而是通过表情符号输入来引导故事的基调，其语义模糊性成为一种资源而不是限制。与依赖明确描述的传统文本到图像工具不同，One Kiss 使用双流输入，用户通过绘制面板框架来定义结构节奏，并通过将关键词与表情符号配对来设置氛围基调。这种机制可以实现“流派流动”，即情感输入在各个面板上积累并逐渐改变故事的流派。一项初步研究（N = 6）表明，这种软引导方法可能会将用户的角色从提示工程师重新定义为叙事导演，而模糊性可以成为创造性惊喜的来源，而不是失去控制。
Abstract：Generative AI has made visual storytelling widely accessible, yet current prompt-based interactions often force users into a trade-off between precise control and creative flow. We present One Kiss, a co-creative comic generation system that introduces "Affective Steering". Instead of writing text prompts, users guide the tone of their story through emoji inputs, whose semantic ambiguity becomes a resource rather than a limitation. Unlike traditional text-to-image tools that rely on explicit descriptions, One Kiss uses a dual-stream input in which users define structural pacing by sketching panel frames and set atmospheric tone by pairing keywords with emojis. This mechanism enables "Genre Flux," where emotional inputs accumulate across panels and gradually shift the genre of a story. A preliminary study (N = 6) suggests that this soft steering approach may reframe the user's role from prompt engineer to narrative director, with ambiguity serving as a source of creative surprise rather than a loss of control.

 


【6】Balancing Openness and Safety: Central and Peripheral Governance Practices in the Lesbian Subreddit Ecosystem

标题 : 平衡开放与安全：女同性恋 Subreddit 生态系统的中心与边缘治理实践
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16176
作者：Yan Xia,Sushmita Khan,Naiyah Lewis,Jinkyung Katie Park
摘要：在线 LGBTQ+ 社区面临着持续的紧张局势：在欢迎新人的同时保护成员免受骚扰。对于 Reddit 上的女同性恋社区来说，这一挑战尤其严峻，这些社区不是作为孤立的群体，而是作为一个相互关联的生态系统运作。我们通过将跨 Reddit 子版块链接的网络分析与 167 个 Reddit 子版块规则的定性主题分析相结合，研究如何在女同性恋 Reddit 子版块生态系统 (N=29) 中协商这种紧张关系。我们的研究结果表明，中央（34%）和外围子版块（66%）之间存在治理劳动的功能分工。虽然所有社区都有共同的安全法规基线，但中心子版块优先考虑内容管理和提要质量，以支持大量面向公众的受众，而外围子版块则强调边界维护和参与控制，以保护较小的、特定于身份的利基市场。这些发现挑战了单一的调节方法，并强调了生态系统意识设计的必要性。我们认为，有效的审核需要角色和上下文敏感的工具来支持互连空间的可见性和安全性。
Abstract：Online LGBTQ+ communities face a persistent tension: remaining visible to welcome newcomers while protecting members from harassment. This challenge is particularly acute for lesbian communities on Reddit, which operate not as isolated groups but as an interconnected ecosystem. We examine how this tension is negotiated across the lesbian subreddit ecosystem (N=29) by combining network analysis of cross-subreddit links with a qualitative thematic analysis of 167 subreddit rules. Our findings show a functional division of governance labor between central (34%) and peripheral subreddits (66%). While all communities share a baseline of safety regulations, central subreddits prioritize content curation and feed quality to support a large, public-facing audience, whereas peripheral subreddits emphasize boundary maintenance and participation control to protect smaller, identity-specific niches. These findings challenge monolithic moderation approaches and highlight the need for ecosystem-aware design. We argue that effective moderation requires role- and context-sensitive tools supporting visibility and safety across interconnected spaces.

 


【7】Change is Hard: Consistent Player Behavior Across Games with Conflicting Incentives

标题 : 改变很难：在激励冲突的游戏中保持一致的玩家行为
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16136
作者：Emily Chen,Alexander J. Bisberg,Dmitri Williams,Magy Seif El-Nasr,Emilio Ferrara
摘要：本文研究了玩家的灵活性（玩家愿意参与多种选择或专业化的意愿）如何在两种游戏环境中体现：英雄联盟（League）和云顶之弈（TFT）。我们分析了 4,830 名在这两款游戏中玩过至少 50 场竞技游戏的玩家的游戏决策，并探索行为保留和一致性的跨游戏动态。我们的工作引入了一种新颖的跨游戏分析，可以跟踪相同玩家在两个不同环境中的行为，从而减少自我选择偏差。我们的研究结果表明，虽然游戏会激励不同的行为（联盟中的专业化与云顶之弈中的灵活性）以实现基于绩效的成功，但玩家在各个平台上表现出一致的行为。这项研究引发了关于代理与结构的长期争论，表明在竞争环境中，个体代理可能比游戏强加的结构更能预测跨平台行为。这些见解为有兴趣构建促进行为改变的系统的游戏开发者、设计师和研究人员提供了启示。
Abstract：This paper examines how player flexibility -- a player's willingness to engage in a breadth of options or specialize -- manifests across two gaming environments: League of Legends (League) and Teamfight Tactics (TFT). We analyze the gameplay decisions of 4,830 players who have played at least 50 competitive games in both titles and explore cross-game dynamics of behavior retention and consistency. Our work introduces a novel cross-game analysis that tracks the same players' behavior across two different environments, reducing self-selection bias. Our findings reveal that while games incentivize different behaviors (specialization in League versus flexibility in TFT) for performance-based success, players exhibit consistent behavior across platforms. This study contributes to long-standing debate about agency versus structure, showing individual agency may be more predictive of cross-platform behavior than game-imposed structure in competitive settings. These insights offer implications for game developers, designers and researchers interested in building systems to promote behavior change.

 


【8】Galaxy Tracer: A Topology-First 3D Interface for Interactive PCAP Exploration

标题 : Galaxy Tracer: A Topology-First 3D Interface for Interactive PCAP Exploration
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16018
作者：Ryan Younger
摘要：Packet analysis tools conventionally present capture data through tabular packet lists, constraining the analyst to a sequential view that obscures the relational structure of network communication. This paper presents Galaxy Tracer, a browser-native packet capture exploration system in which the default interface is an interactive three-dimensional network topology rather than a packet list. Hosts appear as spatially positioned nodes, conversations as edges, and protocol groupings as visually distinct clusters. A synchronized packet list remains available as a secondary view, sharing filter state with the topology so that structural and tabular inspection function as one continuous workflow. The system parses PCAP and PCAPNG formats, dissects over 90 protocols, and renders the topology through Three.js. The paper argues that the third spatial dimension is not merely aesthetic but analytically meaningful: it reveals density, clustering, host centrality, and communication scale that are difficult to perceive in list-only tools.
Abstract：Packet analysis tools conventionally present capture data through tabular packet lists, constraining the analyst to a sequential view that obscures the relational structure of network communication. This paper presents Galaxy Tracer, a browser-native packet capture exploration system in which the default interface is an interactive three-dimensional network topology rather than a packet list. Hosts appear as spatially positioned nodes, conversations as edges, and protocol groupings as visually distinct clusters. A synchronized packet list remains available as a secondary view, sharing filter state with the topology so that structural and tabular inspection function as one continuous workflow. The system parses PCAP and PCAPNG formats, dissects over 90 protocols, and renders the topology through Three.js. The paper argues that the third spatial dimension is not merely aesthetic but analytically meaningful: it reveals density, clustering, host centrality, and communication scale that are difficult to perceive in list-only tools.

 


【9】CoDesignAI: An AI-Enabled Multi-Agent, Multi-User System for Collaborative Urban Design at the Conceptual Stage

标题 : CoDesignAI：一个支持人工智能的多代理、多用户系统，用于概念阶段的协作城市设计
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16008
作者：Zhaoxi Zhang,Ruolin Wu,Feiyang Ren,Sridevi Turaga,Tamir Mendel
摘要：公众参与在协同城市设计中变得越来越重要；然而，现有流程在实现高效且可扩展的公民参与方面常常面临挑战。为了解决这一差距，本研究探讨了大型语言模型 (LLM) 如何支持社区成员在参与式设计中的合作。我们介绍 CoDesignAI，这是一种协作城市设计工具，它将代表居民或利益相关者的多个用户与代表在城市设计概念阶段提供便利和专业知识的领域专家的多个人工智能代理相结合。本文介绍了该工具的系统架构和主要组件，说明了用户如何在协作和迭代设计工作流程中与人工智能代理进行交互。具体来说，该系统将生成式人工智能与空间测绘服务相集成，以支持设计方案的街道级可视化。人工智能代理通过总结讨论内容、提取共享设计意图以及生成呈现设计干预的提示来帮助用户。该系统还使用户能够在记录设计过程的同时多次修改和完善他们的想法。本研究认为，通过将对话式人工智能、多用户交互和基于现实城市环境的基于图像的设计相结合，人工智能支持的设计系统可以帮助城市设计从以专家为中心的实践转变为更加开放和参与的过程。该论文为人工智能辅助协作设计提供了一个新的基于网络的平台，并对人工智能代理如何扩大公众参与城市设计的能力进行了早期探索。
Abstract：Public participation has become increasingly important in collaborative urban design; yet, existing processes often face challenges in achieving efficient and scalable citizen engagement. To address this gap, this study explores how large language models (LLMs) can support cooperation among community members in participatory design. We introduce CoDesignAI, a collaborative urban design tool that combines multiple users, representing residents or stakeholders, with multiple AI agents, representing domain experts who provide facilitation and professional knowledge during the conceptual stage of urban design. This paper presents the system architecture and main components of the tool, illustrating how users interact with AI agents within a collaborative and iterative design workflow. Specifically, the system integrates generative AI with spatial mapping services to support street-level visualization of design proposals. AI agents assist users by summarizing discussion content, extracting shared design intentions, and generating prompts for presenting design interventions. The system also enables users to revise and refine their ideas over multiple rounds while documenting the design process. By combining conversational AI, multi-user interaction, and image-based design grounded in real-world urban contexts, this study argues that AI-enabled design systems can help shift urban design from an expert-centered practice to a more open and participatory process. The paper contributes a new web-based platform for AI-assisted collaborative design and offers an early exploration of how AI agents may expand the capacity for public participation in urban design.

 


【10】The Midas Touch in Gaze vs. Hand Pointing: Modality-Specific Failure Modes and Implications for XR Interfaces

标题 : 凝视与手势中的点石成金：特定模态的故障模式和对 XR 接口的影响
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15991
作者：Mohammad Dastgheib,Fatemeh Pourmahdian
摘要：扩展现实 (XR) 界面提出了人体工程学和认知要求，但当前的系统常常强制在基于手的输入（可能会产生疲劳）和基于凝视的输入（容易受到点石成金问题和精度限制的影响）之间做出二元选择。我们介绍了 xr-adaptive-modality-2025 平台，这是一个基于网络的开源框架，用于研究特定模态的自适应干预是否可以提高 XR 相关的指向性能并减少相对于静态单模态交互的工作量。该平台结合了生理学凝视模拟、ISO 9241-9 多向敲击任务以及两种特定于模态的自适应干预措施：凝视整理和手部目标宽度膨胀。我们以 2 x 2 x 2 受试者内设计操纵模态（手与凝视）、UI 模式（静态与自适应）和压力（是与否）来评估系统。 N = 69 名参与者的结果表明，手比凝视产生更高的吞吐量（5.17 比 4.73 位/秒）、更低的错误（1.8% 比 19.1%）以及更低的 NASA-TLX 工作负载。至关重要的是，错误概况因方式而异：注视错误主要是失误（99.2%），而手部错误主要是失误（95.7%），这与 Midas Touch 的说法一致。在这两种自适应干预措施中，仅在此数据集中执行凝视整理；它适度减少了超时但没有失误。由于 UI 集成错误，手宽膨胀无法评估。这些发现揭示了特定模式的失效模式，对适应性政策设计有直接影响，并将该平台建立为未来研究的可重复基础设施。
Abstract：Extended Reality (XR) interfaces impose both ergonomic and cognitive demands, yet current systems often force a binary choice between hand-based input, which can produce fatigue, and gaze-based input, which is vulnerable to the Midas Touch problem and precision limitations. We introduce the xr-adaptive-modality-2025 platform, a web-based open-source framework for studying whether modality-specific adaptive interventions can improve XR-relevant pointing performance and reduce workload relative to static unimodal interaction. The platform combines physiologically informed gaze simulation, an ISO 9241-9 multidirectional tapping task, and two modality-specific adaptive interventions: gaze declutter and hand target-width inflation. We evaluated the system in a 2 x 2 x 2 within-subjects design manipulating Modality (Hand vs. Gaze), UI Mode (Static vs. Adaptive), and Pressure (Yes vs. No). Results from N=69 participants show that hand yielded higher throughput than gaze (5.17 vs. 4.73 bits/s), lower error (1.8% vs. 19.1%), and lower NASA-TLX workload. Crucially, error profiles differed sharply by modality: gaze errors were predominantly slips (99.2%), whereas hand errors were predominantly misses (95.7%), consistent with the Midas Touch account. Of the two adaptive interventions, only gaze declutter executed in this dataset; it modestly reduced timeouts but not slips. Hand width inflation was not evaluable due to a UI integration bug. These findings reveal modality-specific failure modes with direct implications for adaptive policy design, and establish the platform as a reproducible infrastructure for future studies.

 


 

机器人技术(cs.RO:Robotics)

【1】ManiTwin: Scaling Data-Generation-Ready Digital Object Dataset to 100K

标题 : ManiTwin：将数据生成就绪的数字对象数据集扩展到 100K
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16866
作者：Kaixuan Wang,Tianxing Chen,Jiawei Liu,Honghao Su,Shaolong Zhu,Minxuan Wang,Zixuan Li,Yue Chen,Huan-ang Gao,Yusen Qin,Jiawei Wang,Qixuan Zhang,Lan Xu,Jingyi Yu,Yao Mu,Ping Luo
摘要：模拟学习为扩展机器人操纵能力提供了有用的基础。然而，这种范式往往缺乏可用于数据生成的数字资产，无论是规模还是多样性。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ManiTwin，这是一种自动化且高效的管道，用于生成数据生成就绪的数字对象双胞胎。我们的管道将单个图像转换为模拟就绪且带语义注释的 3D 资产，从而实现大规模机器人操作数据生成。使用此管道，我们构建了 ManiTwin-100K，这是一个包含 100K 高质量带注释的 3D 资产的数据集。每个资产都配备了物理属性、语言描述、功能注释和经过验证的操作建议。实验表明，ManiTwin 提供了高效的资产合成和注释工作流程，ManiTwin-100K 为操作数据生成、随机场景合成和 VQA 数据生成提供了高质量和多样化的资产，为可扩展的模拟数据合成和策略学习奠定了坚实的基础。我们的网页位于 https://manitwin.github.io/。
Abstract：Learning in simulation provides a useful foundation for scaling robotic manipulation capabilities. However, this paradigm often suffers from a lack of data-generation-ready digital assets, in both scale and diversity. In this work, we present ManiTwin, an automated and efficient pipeline for generating data-generation-ready digital object twins. Our pipeline transforms a single image into simulation-ready and semantically annotated 3D asset, enabling large-scale robotic manipulation data generation. Using this pipeline, we construct ManiTwin-100K, a dataset containing 100K high-quality annotated 3D assets. Each asset is equipped with physical properties, language descriptions, functional annotations, and verified manipulation proposals. Experiments demonstrate that ManiTwin provides an efficient asset synthesis and annotation workflow, and that ManiTwin-100K offers high-quality and diverse assets for manipulation data generation, random scene synthesis, and VQA data generation, establishing a strong foundation for scalable simulation data synthesis and policy learning. Our webpage is available at https://manitwin.github.io/.

 


【2】MolmoB0T: Large-Scale Simulation Enables Zero-Shot Manipulation

标题 : MolmoB0T：大规模仿真实现零射击操作
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16861
作者：Abhay Deshpande,Maya Guru,Rose Hendrix,Snehal Jauhri,Ainaz Eftekhar,Rohun Tripathi,Max Argus,Jordi Salvador,Haoquan Fang,Matthew Wallingford,Wilbert Pumacay,Yejin Kim,Quinn Pfeifer,Ying-Chun Lee,Piper Wolters,Omar Rayyan,Mingtong Zhang,Jiafei Duan,Karen Farley,Winson Han,Eli Vanderbilt,Dieter Fox,Ali Farhadi,Georgia Chalvatzaki,Dhruv Shah, et al. (1 additional authors not shown)
摘要：机器人学习中的一个普遍观点是，仅靠模拟是不够的；还需要进行模拟。人们普遍认为，有效的模拟到真实的传输至少需要一些现实世界的数据收集或特定于任务的微调，以弥合模拟环境和物理环境之间的差距。我们挑战这个假设。通过足够大规模和多样化的模拟合成训练数据，我们表明零样本转移到现实世界不仅是可能的，而且对于静态和移动操作都是有效的。我们推出了 MolmoBot-Engine，这是一个完全开源的管道，用于在 MolmoSpaces 中跨机器人、任务和各种模拟环境生成程序数据。借助它，我们发布了 MolmoBot-Data，这是一个包含 180 万条专家轨迹的数据集，用于铰接式对象操作和拾放任务。我们训练三个策略类：MolmoBot，一种基于 Molmo2 的多框架视觉语言模型，具有流程匹配动作头； MolmoBot-Pi0，复制 $π_0$ 架构以实现直接比较； MolmoBot-SPOC，一种适合边缘部署并适合 RL 微调的轻量级策略。我们对两个机器人平台进行评估：用于桌面操作任务的 Franka FR3 和用于开门、抽屉操作、橱柜交互和移动拾放的 Rainbow Robotics RB-Y1 移动机械手。在没有任何现实世界微调的情况下，我们的策略实现了对不可见物体和环境的零镜头传输。在桌面拾取和放置方面，MolmoBot 在 4 种设置的现实世界评估中取得了 79.2% 的成功率，优于 $π_{0.5}$ 的 39.2%。我们的结果表明，程序环境生成与多样化的铰接资产相结合可以产生强大的操纵政策，广泛推广到现实世界。技术博客：https://allenai.org/blog/molmobot-robot-manipulation
Abstract：A prevailing view in robot learning is that simulation alone is not enough; effective sim-to-real transfer is widely believed to require at least some real-world data collection or task-specific fine-tuning to bridge the gap between simulated and physical environments. We challenge that assumption. With sufficiently large-scale and diverse simulated synthetic training data, we show that zero-shot transfer to the real world is not only possible, but effective for both static and mobile manipulation. We introduce MolmoBot-Engine, a fully open-source pipeline for procedural data generation across robots, tasks, and diverse simulated environments in MolmoSpaces. With it, we release MolmoBot-Data, a dataset of 1.8 million expert trajectories for articulated object manipulation and pick-and-place tasks. We train three policy classes: MolmoBot, a Molmo2-based multi-frame vision-language model with a flow-matching action head; MolmoBot-Pi0, which replicates the $π_0$ architecture to enable direct comparison; and MolmoBot-SPOC, a lightweight policy suitable for edge deployment and amenable to RL fine-tuning. We evaluate on two robotic platforms: the Franka FR3 for tabletop manipulation tasks and the Rainbow Robotics RB-Y1 mobile manipulator for door opening, drawer manipulation, cabinet interaction, and mobile pick-and-place. Without any real-world fine-tuning, our policies achieve zero-shot transfer to unseen objects and environments. On tabletop pick-and-place, MolmoBot achieves a success rate of 79.2% in real world evaluations across 4 settings, outperforming $π_{0.5}$ at 39.2%. Our results demonstrate that procedural environment generation combined with diverse articulated assets can produce robust manipulation policies that generalize broadly to the real world. Technical Blog: https://allenai.org/blog/molmobot-robot-manipulation

 


【3】DreamPlan: Efficient Reinforcement Fine-Tuning of Vision-Language Planners via Video World Models

标题 : DreamPlan：通过视频世界模型对视觉语言规划器进行高效强化微调
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16860
作者：Emily Yue-Ting Jia,Weiduo Yuan,Tianheng Shi,Vitor Guizilini,Jiageng Mao,Yue Wang
摘要：机器人操作需要复杂的常识推理，这是大规模视觉语言模型（VLM）自然具备的能力。虽然 VLM 显示出作为零样本规划器的前景，但在复杂的现实环境中部署时，它们缺乏扎实的物理理解，通常会导致复合错误和低成功率，特别是对于可变形对象操纵等具有挑战性的任务。尽管强化学习 (RL) 可以使这些规划器适应特定的任务动态，但通过现实世界的交互直接微调 VLM 成本高昂、不安全且样本效率低下。为了克服这个瓶颈，我们引入了 DreamPlan，这是一种通过视频世界模型对 VLM 规划器进行强化微调的新颖框架。 DreamPlan 不依赖昂贵的物理部署，而是首先利用零样本 VLM 来收集探索性交互数据。我们证明，这种次优数据足以训练动作条件视频生成模型，该模型隐式捕获复杂的现实世界物理现象。随后，VLM 规划器使用比值比策略优化 (ORPO) 完全在该视频世界模型的“想象”范围内进行微调。通过利用这些虚拟部署，物理和特定于任务的知识被有效地注入到 VLM 中。我们的结果表明，DreamPlan 弥合了语义推理和物理基础之间的差距，显着提高了操作成功率，而无需大规模的现实世界数据收集。我们的项目页面是 https://psi-lab.ai/DreamPlan/。
Abstract：Robotic manipulation requires sophisticated commonsense reasoning, a capability naturally possessed by large-scale Vision-Language Models (VLMs). While VLMs show promise as zero-shot planners, their lack of grounded physical understanding often leads to compounding errors and low success rates when deployed in complex real-world environments, particularly for challenging tasks like deformable object manipulation. Although Reinforcement Learning (RL) can adapt these planners to specific task dynamics, directly fine-tuning VLMs via real-world interaction is prohibitively expensive, unsafe, and sample-inefficient. To overcome this bottleneck, we introduce DreamPlan, a novel framework for the reinforcement fine-tuning of VLM planners via video world models. Instead of relying on costly physical rollouts, DreamPlan first leverages the zero-shot VLM to collect exploratory interaction data. We demonstrate that this sub-optimal data is sufficient to train an action-conditioned video generation model, which implicitly captures complex real-world physics. Subsequently, the VLM planner is fine-tuned entirely within the "imagination" of this video world model using Odds Ratio Policy Optimization (ORPO). By utilizing these virtual rollouts, physical and task-specific knowledge is efficiently injected into the VLM. Our results indicate that DreamPlan bridges the gap between semantic reasoning and physical grounding, significantly improving manipulation success rates without the need for large-scale real-world data collection. Our project page is https://psi-lab.ai/DreamPlan/.

 


【4】BrickSim: A Physics-Based Simulator for Manipulating Interlocking Brick Assemblies

标题 : BrickSim：用于操纵联锁砖组件的基于物理的模拟器
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16853
作者：Haowei Wen,Ruixuan Liu,Weiyi Piao,Siyu Li,Changliu Liu
摘要：联锁砖组件为接触丰富且长视野的机器人操作提供了标准化但具有挑战性的测试台，但现有的刚体模拟器无法忠实地捕捉卡扣配合力学。我们推出了 BrickSim，这是第一个用于联锁砖组件的基于物理的实时模拟器。 BrickSim 引入了一种用于卡扣连接的紧凑的基于力的力学模型，并使用结构化的凸二次程序求解所得的内力分布。结合混合架构，将刚体动力学委托给底层物理引擎，同时单独处理卡扣配合力学，BrickSim 能够实时、高保真地模拟装配、拆卸和结构倒塌。在 150 个实际装配体中，BrickSim 的静态稳定性预测准确率达到 100%，平均求解时间为 5 毫秒。在动态跌落测试中，它还忠实地再现了现实世界的结构倒塌，精确反映了破损的发生和具体的破损位置。 BrickSim 基于 Isaac Sim 构建，进一步支持与各种机器人和现有管道的无缝集成。我们展示了使用 BrickSim 进行砖块组件的机器人构造，强调了其作为灵巧、长视野机器人操作研究基础的潜力。 BrickSim 是开源的，代码可在 https://github.com/intelligent-control-lab/BrickSim 获取。
Abstract：Interlocking brick assemblies provide a standardized yet challenging testbed for contact-rich and long-horizon robotic manipulation, but existing rigid-body simulators do not faithfully capture snap-fit mechanics. We present BrickSim, the first real-time physics-based simulator for interlocking brick assemblies. BrickSim introduces a compact force-based mechanics model for snap-fit connections and solves the resulting internal force distribution using a structured convex quadratic program. Combined with a hybrid architecture that delegates rigid-body dynamics to the underlying physics engine while handling snap-fit mechanics separately, BrickSim enables real-time, high-fidelity simulation of assembly, disassembly, and structural collapse. On 150 real-world assemblies, BrickSim achieves 100% accuracy in static stability prediction with an average solve time of 5 ms. In dynamic drop tests, it also faithfully reproduces real-world structural collapse, precisely mirroring both the occurrence of breakage and the specific breakage locations. Built on Isaac Sim, BrickSim further supports seamless integration with a wide variety of robots and existing pipelines. We demonstrate robotic construction of brick assemblies using BrickSim, highlighting its potential as a foundation for research in dexterous, long-horizon robotic manipulation. BrickSim is open-source, and the code is available at https://github.com/intelligent-control-lab/BrickSim.

 


【5】Real-Time Decoding of Movement Onset and Offset for Brain-Controlled Rehabilitation Exoskeleton

标题 : 脑控康复外骨骼运动起始和偏移的实时解码
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16825
作者：Kanishka Mitra,Satyam Kumar,Frigyes Samuel Racz,Deland Liu,Ashish D. Deshpande,José del R. Millán
摘要：机器人辅助治疗可以在神经损伤后提供高剂量、针对特定任务的训练，但大多数系统主要在肢体层面发挥作用，仅间接参与受损的神经回路，这仍然是真正针对神经可塑性康复的关键障碍。我们通过对上肢外骨骼实施在线双态运动想象控制来解决这一差距，从而能够直接从非侵入性脑电图启动和终止目标导向的动作。八名参与者使用脑电图启动援助，然后自愿停止机器人的轨迹。在两次在线会议中，组平均起始命中率为 61.5%，抵消命中率为 64.5%，这表明尽管存在仪器噪音和被动手臂运动，但仍能可靠地发出启停命令。在方法上，我们揭示了使用不对称边缘诊断由常见的基于任务的重心引起的系统性的、类驱动的偏差，并且我们引入了一种与类无关的基于固定的重心方法，该方法在不采样命令类的情况下跟踪漂移，同时保留类几何形状。这大大提高了无阈值可分离性（AUC 增益：起始 +56%，p = 0.0117；偏移 +34%，p = 0.0251），并减少了日内和日间偏差。总之，这些结果有助于将离线解码与康复外骨骼的实用、意图驱动的启停控制联系起来，实现与神经可塑性目标相一致的精确定时、应急援助，同时支持未来的临床转化。
Abstract：Robot-assisted therapy can deliver high-dose, task-specific training after neurologic injury, but most systems act primarily at the limb level-engaging the impaired neural circuits only indirectly-which remains a key barrier to truly contingent, neuroplasticity-targeted rehabilitation. We address this gap by implementing online, dual-state motor imagery control of an upper-limb exoskeleton, enabling goal-directed reaches to be both initiated and terminated directly from non-invasive EEG. Eight participants used EEG to initiate assistance and then volitionally halt the robot mid-trajectory. Across two online sessions, group-mean hit rates were 61.5% for onset and 64.5% for offset, demonstrating reliable start-stop command delivery despite instrumental noise and passive arm motion. Methodologically, we reveal a systematic, class-driven bias induced by common task-based recentering using an asymmetric margin diagnostic, and we introduce a class-agnostic fixation-based recentering method that tracks drift without sampling command classes while preserving class geometry. This substantially improves threshold-free separability (AUC gains: onset +56%, p = 0.0117; offset +34%, p = 0.0251) and reduces bias within and across days. Together, these results help bridge offline decoding and practical, intention-driven start-stop control of a rehabilitation exoskeleton, enabling precisely timed, contingent assistance aligned with neuroplasticity goals while supporting future clinical translation.

 


【6】CABTO: Context-Aware Behavior Tree Grounding for Robot Manipulation

标题 : CABTO：机器人操作的情境感知行为树基础
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16809
作者：Yishuai Cai,Xinglin Chen,Yunxin Mao,Kun Hu,Minglong Li,Yaodong Yang,Yuanpei Chen
摘要：行为树 (BT) 为设计模块化和反应式机器人控制器提供了强大的范例。 BT规划作为一个新兴领域，为自动生成可靠的BT提供了理论保证。然而，BT 规划通常假设精心设计的 BT 系统已经落地（包括高级行动模型和低级控制策略），这通常需要广泛的专家知识和手动操作。在本文中，我们将 BT 接地问题形式化：自动构建完整且一致的 BT 系统。我们分析了它的复杂性，并引入了 CABTO（上下文感知行为树接地），它是第一个有效解决这一挑战的框架。 CABTO 利用预先训练的大型模型 (LM) 在 BT 规划者的上下文反馈和环境观察的指导下启发式搜索行动模型和控制政策的空间。跨越三个不同机器人操作场景的七个任务集的实验证明了 CABTO 在生成完整且一致的行为树系统方面的有效性和效率。
Abstract：Behavior Trees (BTs) offer a powerful paradigm for designing modular and reactive robot controllers. BT planning, an emerging field, provides theoretical guarantees for the automated generation of reliable BTs. However, BT planning typically assumes that a well-designed BT system is already grounded -- comprising high-level action models and low-level control policies -- which often requires extensive expert knowledge and manual effort. In this paper, we formalize the BT Grounding problem: the automated construction of a complete and consistent BT system. We analyze its complexity and introduce CABTO (Context-Aware Behavior Tree grOunding), the first framework to efficiently solve this challenge. CABTO leverages pre-trained Large Models (LMs) to heuristically search the space of action models and control policies, guided by contextual feedback from BT planners and environmental observations. Experiments spanning seven task sets across three distinct robotic manipulation scenarios demonstrate CABTO's effectiveness and efficiency in generating complete and consistent behavior tree systems.

 


【7】DexGrasp-Zero: A Morphology-Aligned Policy for Zero-Shot Cross-Embodiment Dexterous Grasping

标题 : DexGrasp-Zero：零射击跨实体灵巧抓取的形态学对齐策略
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16806
作者：Yuliang Wu,Yanhan Lin,WengKit Lao,Yuhao Lin,Yi-Lin Wei,Wei-Shi Zheng,Ancong Wu
摘要：为了满足日益多样化的灵巧手硬件的需求，制定一种无需冗余重新学习即可实现零样本跨实体抓取的策略至关重要。由于手部运动学和物理约束的异构性，跨实施例对齐具有挑战性。现有方法通常预测中间运动目标并将其重新定位到每个实施例，这可能会引入错误并违反实施例特定的限制，从而阻碍跨不同手的转移。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了 \textit{DexGrasp-Zero}，一种从不同实施例中学习通用抓取技能的策略，从而实现零镜头转移到看不见的手。我们首先引入形态对齐的图形表示，它将每只手的运动学关键点映射到解剖学基础节点，并为每个节点配备三轴正交运动基元，从而实现不同形态之间的结构和语义对齐。依靠这种基于图的表示，我们设计了一个\textit{形态对齐图卷积网络}（MAGCN）来对图进行编码以进行策略学习。 MAGCN 结合了 \textit{物理属性注入} 机制，将手部特定的物理约束融合到图形特征中，从而能够对不同的链接长度和驱动限制进行自适应补偿，以实现精确稳定的抓取。我们对 YCB 数据集进行的广泛模拟评估表明，我们的策略在四只异构手（Allegro、Shadow、Schunk、Ability）上联合训练，在看不见的硬件（LEAP、Inspire）上实现了 85% 的零射击成功率，比最先进的方法高出 59.5%。现实世界的实验进一步评估了我们在三个机器人平台（LEAP、Inspire、Revo2）上的策略，在看不见的物体上实现了 82% 的平均成功率。
Abstract：To meet the demands of increasingly diverse dexterous hand hardware, it is crucial to develop a policy that enables zero-shot cross-embodiment grasping without redundant re-learning. Cross-embodiment alignment is challenging due to heterogeneous hand kinematics and physical constraints. Existing approaches typically predict intermediate motion targets and retarget them to each embodiment, which may introduce errors and violate embodiment-specific limits, hindering transfer across diverse hands. To overcome these limitations, we propose \textit{DexGrasp-Zero}, a policy that learns universal grasping skills from diverse embodiments, enabling zero-shot transfer to unseen hands. We first introduce a morphology-aligned graph representation that maps each hand's kinematic keypoints to anatomically grounded nodes and equips each node with tri-axial orthogonal motion primitives, enabling structural and semantic alignment across different morphologies. Relying on this graph-based representation, we design a \textit{Morphology-Aligned Graph Convolutional Network} (MAGCN) to encode the graph for policy learning. MAGCN incorporates a \textit{Physical Property Injection} mechanism that fuses hand-specific physical constraints into the graph features, enabling adaptive compensation for varying link lengths and actuation limits for precise and stable grasping. Our extensive simulation evaluations on the YCB dataset demonstrate that our policy, jointly trained on four heterogeneous hands (Allegro, Shadow, Schunk, Ability), achieves an 85\% zero-shot success rate on unseen hardware (LEAP, Inspire), outperforming the state-of-the-art method by 59.5\%. Real-world experiments further evaluate our policy on three robot platforms (LEAP, Inspire, Revo2), achieving an 82\% average success rate on unseen objects.

 


【8】Development of Low-Cost and Bidirectional Syringe Pumps for Soft Robotics Applications

标题 : 开发用于软体机器人应用的低成本双向注射泵
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16803
作者：Krishamsu Subedi Chhetri,Aryan Mayor,Elise Corbin,Logan Walker,John Rieffel
摘要：软机器人技术利用可变形材料来开发能够在非结构化和动态环境中导航的机器人。基于硅胶体素的软机器人（Silibots）是一种气动驱动的软机器人，它依靠体素的膨胀和收缩来实现变形行为。然而，传统的气动驱动方法（高压电磁阀、医用隔膜泵、微型压缩机、压缩流体）由于其有限的功效、成本、复杂性或缺乏精度而带来了重大挑战。这项工作引入了一种低成本、模块化的注射泵系统，该系统由现成的 3D 打印部件构成，旨在克服这些限制。注射泵系统还具有抽真空以及将空气泵入软机器人的独特能力，从而增强了驱动能力。此外，注射泵具有模块化硬件和可定制的软件，允许研究人员根据自己的要求定制注射泵或以独特的泵参数同时操作多个泵。这种灵活性使注射泵成为一种易于使用且可扩展的工具，为在研究和教育中更广泛地采用软机器人技术铺平了道路。
Abstract：Soft robotics leverages deformable materials to develop robots capable of navigating unstructured and dynamic environments. Silicone Voxel-Based Soft Robots (Silibots) are a type of pneumatically actuated soft robots that rely on the inflation and deflation of their voxels for shape-shifting behaviors. However, traditional pneumatic actuation methods (high pressure solenoids, medical diaphragm pumps, micro compressors, compressed fluid) pose significant challenges due to their limited efficacy, cost, complexity, or lack of precision. This work introduces a low cost and modular syringe pump system, constructed with off the shelf and 3D printed parts, designed to overcome these limitations. The syringe pump system also enhances actuation with the unique ability to pull a vacuum as well pump air into the soft robot. Furthermore, the syringe pump features modular hardware and customizable software, allowing for researchers to tailor the syringe pump to their requirements or operate multiple pumps simultaneously with unique pump parameters. This flexibility makes the syringe pump an accessible and scalable tool that paves the way for broader adoption of soft robotic technologies in research and education.

 


【9】Beyond Cybathlon: On-demand Quadrupedal Assistance for People with Limited Mobility

标题 : 超越 Cybathlon：为行动不便人士提供按需四足协助
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16772
作者：Carmen Scheidemann,Andrei Cramariuc,Changan Chen,Jia-Ruei Chiu,Marco Hutter
摘要：背景：辅助机器人有潜力提高因行动不便或坐轮椅而需要日常护理的人们的独立性。目前将机械臂连接到电动轮椅上的解决方案提供了有限的额外移动性，但代价是增加了尺寸并降低了轮椅的可操作性。方法：我们提出了一种通过共享自主方法控制的按需四足辅助机器人系统，该系统将半自主任务执行与人类远程操作相结合。由于系统的移动特性，它可以在需要时协助操作员并独立执行自主任务，而不会限制他们的移动性。我们通过语义、碰撞感知导航自动执行拾放任务以及机器人在环境中的移动。对于远程操作，我们提供了一个嘴部操纵杆接口，使行动不便的操作员能够控制机器人的末端执行器以进行精确操作。结果：我们在 \textit{Cybathlon 2024 辅助机器人竞赛}中展示了我们的系统，并在家庭实验设置中对其进行了验证，我们测量了任务完成时间和用户满意度。我们发现我们的系统能够协助完成各种任务，包括那些需要灵巧操作的任务。用户研究证实了这样的直觉：增加机器人自主权可以减轻操作员的精神负担。结论：我们提出了一种灵活的系统，可以帮助轮椅使用者在日常生活中保持独立性，使他们能够在没有外部支持的情况下解决移动操作问题。我们在主观指标上取得了与之前最先进的结果相当的结果，同时允许操作员拥有更多的自主权和更大的操纵灵活性。
Abstract：Background: Assistance robots have the potential to increase the independence of people who need daily care due to limited mobility or being wheelchair-bound. Current solutions of attaching robotic arms to motorized wheelchairs offer limited additional mobility at the cost of increased size and reduced wheelchair maneuverability. Methods: We present an on-demand quadrupedal assistance robot system controlled via a shared autonomy approach, which combines semi-autonomous task execution with human teleoperation. Due to the mobile nature of the system it can assist the operator whenever needed and perform autonomous tasks independently, without otherwise restricting their mobility. We automate pick-and-place tasks, as well as robot movement through the environment with semantic, collision-aware navigation. For teleoperation, we present a mouth-level joystick interface that enables an operator with reduced mobility to control the robot's end effector for precision manipulation. Results: We showcase our system in the \textit{Cybathlon 2024 Assistance Robot Race}, and validate it in an at-home experimental setup, where we measure task completion times and user satisfaction. We find our system capable of assisting in a broad variety of tasks, including those that require dexterous manipulation. The user study confirms the intuition that increased robot autonomy alleviates the operator's mental load. Conclusions: We present a flexible system that has the potential to help people in wheelchairs maintain independence in everyday life by enabling them to solve mobile manipulation problems without external support. We achieve results comparable to previous state-of-the-art on subjective metrics while allowing for more autonomy of the operator and greater agility for manipulation.

 


【10】vAccSOL: Efficient and Transparent AI Vision Offloading for Mobile Robots

标题 : vAccSOL：移动机器人高效透明的人工智能视觉卸载
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.16685
作者：Adam Zahir,Michele Gucciardom Falk Selker,Anastasios Nanos,Kostis Papazafeiropoulos,Carlos J. Bernardos,Nicolas Weber,Roberto Gonzalez
摘要：移动机器人越来越多地用于检查、巡逻和搜救行动，依靠计算机视觉进行感知、导航和自主决策。然而，由于有限的计算资源和严格的能源限制，在机上执行现代视觉工作负载具有挑战性。虽然某些平台包含嵌入式加速器，但它们通常与专有软件堆栈绑定，从而使用户定义的工作负载在资源有限的配套计算机上运行。我们推出了 vAccSOL，这是一个跨异构机器人和边缘平台高效、透明地执行基于人工智能的视觉工作负载的框架。 vAccSOL 集成了两个组件：SOL（一种神经网络编译器，可生成具有最小运行时依赖性的优化推理库）和 vAccel（一种轻量级执行框架，可透明地将推理分派到机器人本地或附近的边缘基础设施）。这种组合可以实现硬件优化的推理和灵活的执行布局，而无需修改机器人应用程序。我们在真实世界的测试台上评估 vAccSOL，该测试台配有商用四足机器人和 12 个涵盖图像分类、视频分类和语义分割的深度学习模型。与 PyTorch 编译器基线相比，SOL 实现了相当或更好的推理性能。通过边缘卸载，与 PyTorch 相比，vAccSOL 将机器人端功耗降低高达 80%，将边缘端功耗降低高达 60%，同时将视觉管道帧速率提高高达 24 倍，从而延长电池供电机器人的运行寿命。
Abstract：Mobile robots are increasingly deployed for inspection, patrol, and search-and-rescue operations, relying on computer vision for perception, navigation, and autonomous decision-making. However, executing modern vision workloads onboard is challenging due to limited compute resources and strict energy constraints. While some platforms include embedded accelerators, these are typically tied to proprietary software stacks, leaving user-defined workloads to run on resource-constrained companion computers. We present vAccSOL, a framework for efficient and transparent execution of AI-based vision workloads across heterogeneous robotic and edge platforms. vAccSOL integrates two components: SOL, a neural network compiler that generates optimized inference libraries with minimal runtime dependencies, and vAccel, a lightweight execution framework that transparently dispatches inference locally on the robot or to nearby edge infrastructure. This combination enables hardware-optimized inference and flexible execution placement without requiring modifications to robot applications. We evaluate vAccSOL on a real-world testbed with a commercial quadruped robot and twelve deep learning models covering image classification, video classification, and semantic segmentation. Compared to a PyTorch compiler baseline, SOL achieves comparable or better inference performance. With edge offloading, vAccSOL reduces robot-side power consumption by up to 80% and edge-side power by up to 60% compared to PyTorch, while increasing vision pipeline frame rate by up to 24x, extending the operating lifetime of battery-powered robots.

 

机器翻译由谷歌翻译提供，仅供参考
